12.reason: Error: This line prints the character before the dash expansion's end again, causing a duplicate. After a valid expansion, the end character (s[i+1]) has already been printed as part of the expansion; the next loop iteration should not reprint it as s[i-1].

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: This line prints the character before the dash expansion's end again, causing a duplicate. After a valid expansion, the end character (s[i+1]) has already been printed as part of the expansion; the next loop iteration should not reprint it as s[i-1].
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  This line prints the character before the current index even when that character has already been printed as part of a previous expansion, causing duplication (e.g., extra 'u' in "a-uB-F").
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  This line causes duplicate output. When an expansion occurs, s[i+1] is printed as part of the range. After i+=2, the next iteration's s[i-1] refers to this same character, causing it to be printed again.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When s[i] is not '-', it prints s[i-1], which was already processed in the previous iteration (either as part of an expansion or a single character), causing duplicate output. It should print s[i] instead.]

25.reason: Missing handling for digit characters [0-9] as required by the problem specification.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing handling for digit characters [0-9] as required by the problem specification.

31.reason: [This prints three characters at once, but the next iteration will re-print s[i+1] as s[i-1] in the next loop step, causing duplication. For example, in "a-uB-F", after processing 'u' and '-', it prints up to 'u', then later 'u' is printed again as the start of the next segment.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This prints three characters at once, but the next iteration will re-print s[i+1] as s[i-1] in the next loop step, causing duplication. For example, in "a-uB-F", after processing 'u' and '-', it prints up to 'u', then later 'u' is printed again as the start of the next segment.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This prints three characters at once, but the next iteration will re-print s[i+1] as s[i-1], causing duplication. For example, in "a-uB-F", after processing 'u' and '-', it prints "u" again when handling 'B'.]
